name: cross-boundary current-session audit activates

input.request: Audit the current session for deep bugs before we merge.
input.context: The session changed an API, persistence query, retry path, and dashboard state. Repository tests and runtime checks are available.

expected_behavior: establish the audit envelope from the current diff and repository rules
map producers, consumers, state transitions, and runtime boundaries
run the repository-supported static analyzer before the manual sweep
separate confirmed, suspected, duplicate, and known findings
report source evidence, reachable failure, verifier, missing test, and mutation for each confirmed finding
report reviewed scope, commands, coverage gaps, and residual risk
